text.title: Survey Design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Survey Design methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: hypothesis-lock
step.action: State as one sentence; nothing else fits.

step.name: draft-questions
step.action: Compose <=12 questions ordered easy -> hard -> demographics.

step.name: bias-lint
step.action: Run bias-linter; rewrite any flagged question.

step.name: pilot-ten
step.action: Pilot N=10; rewrite items >=3 pilots flagged as confusing.

step.name: sample-plan
step.action: Compute required N per segment (target >=120 for 90% CI +/-9%).
step.decision-gate: Refuse launch if recruitment cannot hit N>=120 within reasonable window.

step.name: launch-and-monitor
step.action: Launch; monitor completion rate, drop-off; stop at target N.
